public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as shrine caretaker.
appearance: Ash-touched ritual wear, heat-hardened ornament, and severe ceremonial lines signal renewal through endurance.
manner: Speaks with ritual calm and practiced reassurance, but watches closely for signs of spiritual or civic disturbance. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a shrine caretaker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of shrine caretaker in and around Scarlet Descent Gate, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Scarlet Descent Gate workable through the obligations of shrine caretaker while managing the immediate pressure of shaft collapse in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around Scarlet Descent Gate, that usually means carrying shaft collapse, lava surge, crew loss without letting the role of shrine caretaker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any alliance with Velka Ashvein can expose the party to taboo, doctrine, or institutional expectation centered on Scarlet Descent Gate.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Velka Ashvein immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Scarlet Descent Gate, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Descent Charter Compacts, Frontier Hammer Companies.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Shrine Caretaker, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Psanan.
what_they_refuse: Velka Ashvein refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Shrine Caretaker too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Velka Ashvein can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Velka Ashvein adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
